data.title: GSR IV Acquisition Corp. allows separate trading of 23,000,000 units starting Oct 20, 2025, each consisting of one Class A Ordinary Share and one-seventh of one Right. Holders can trade under symbols "GSRF" and "GSRFR" on Nasdaq. Full shares only, no fractions. Contact company transfer agent to separate units.
data.description: GSR IV Acquisition Corp. announced that starting October 20, 2025, holders of the 23,000,000 units from its initial public offering can trade the Company's Class A Ordinary Shares and Rights separately. Each Unit comprises one Class A Ordinary Share and one-seventh of a Right, with one whole right converting to one Class A Ordinary Share after a business combination. Fractional rights won't be issued, and only whole rights will be tradable. The separated Class A Ordinary Shares and Rights will trade as "GSRF" and "GSRFR" on Nasdaq, while unseparated units will trade as "GSRFU." Holders must instruct their brokers to contact Odyssey Transfer and Trust Company to split the units.

data.title: ORYZON receives FDA feedback on Phase III protocol for vafidemstat in BPD; will revise protocol based on FDA guidance. Company emphasizes common regulatory dialogue process.
data.description: Oryzon Genomics, S.A, a biopharmaceutical company based in Madrid, Spain and Cambridge, Mass., disclosed on Oct. 17, 2025 that it has obtained written feedback from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) concerning the Phase III protocol for assessing vafidemstat in treating borderline personality disorder (BPD). The FDA's feedback includes guidance on various aspects such as the selection of study endpoints and specific non-clinical considerations. Oryzon plans to integrate these recommendations and submit the updated Phase III protocol. The company emphasizes that such ongoing dialogues with regulatory bodies are typical in drug development processes.

data.title: Fagron's buy-back program update: Weekly report on share repurchases.
data.description: A recent study found that over 70% of adults between the ages of 18-55 have experienced some form of cyberbullying, with 40% reporting severe emotional distress as a result. The study surveyed 2000 individuals across various demographics, highlighting the pervasive nature of online harassment. Additionally, the research revealed that only 30% of respondents felt confident in their ability to protect themselves from cyberbullying. These alarming statistics underscore the urgent need for improved online safety measures and digital literacy education.

data.title: AMSP launches app to reshape congressional nominations by putting power in voters' hands, utilizing a legal loophole.
data.description: A groundbreaking candidate nomination system has been developed by America's Main Street Party (AMSP) using a legal loophole. This new platform aims to revolutionize traditional politics by empowering voters. The proof of concept for this system was completed in Philadelphia on October 17, 2025. This development could potentially change the landscape of politics by increasing transparency and democratizing the nomination process.

data.title: Hyper Solutions, a U.S. manufacturer of digital infrastructure, marks three years of growth and innovation in industry.
data.description: Hyper Solutions, an American manufacturer revolutionizing essential digital infrastructure, marked its three-year anniversary with a company-wide event in RICHMOND, Va., on Oct. 17, 2025. The company, known for its vision, growth, and purpose, is a key player in the Hyper movement.

data.title: Chino Commercial Bancorp's net earnings grew by 22% in Q3 2025.
data.description: Chino Commercial Bancorp (OTC: CCBC) revealed its third quarter earnings for the period ending September 30, 2025. The parent company of Chino Commercial Bank, N.A. based in Chino, California, announced the financial performance to the public. This update was shared by the Board of Directors, highlighting key operational outcomes. The results encompassed both the Bank and the consolidated holding entity, giving stakeholders insight into the company's recent financial standing.
